LanguageData.VCEF_Aquabounty.description: An expertise in getting lucky when fishing, catching special items that are not fish.
LanguageData.VCEF_Aquabounty.label: Aquabounty
LanguageData.VCEF_Catchmastery.description: An expertise in fish catching that increases the amount of fish caught.
LanguageData.VCEF_Catchmastery.label: Catchmastery
LanguageData.VCEF_Swiftcasting.description: An expertise in fishing speed that reduces the time spent on fishing jobs.
LanguageData.VCEF_Swiftcasting.label: Swiftcasting
